ddt:Target.Name: R010 v2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ********************
v0.1 June 2009 : Creation based on R2 08 V3.8 database (R. Rimlinger)
v0.2 October 2009 : Modification by AKKA with following sources document : - R0-10 Diagnosis Services Implémentation DDIV/DIESE/65607/2009/41 - R0-10 Diagnosis Requirements DDIV/DIESE/65607/2009/42
v0.3 October 2009 : Modification by AKKA : - debug
v0.4 October 2009 : Modification by AKKA : - debug - rectification applicable project
V0.7 April 2010 : Modification by AKKA : - configuration sheet and DDT 2000 data base compliance
V0.8 May 2010 : Modification by AKKA : - modification of traceability request and data
V0.9 August 2010 : Modification by AKKA : - Change number of bytes of "phone acoustic parameter" to 310 bytes. - Correction of VAL BAT value 5 bits lenght instead of 6 bits.
V1.0 Iunie 2016: Modification by GLAVAN Dragos-Cosmin : - Added new ECU2 Configuration for new SWRC types - Added software versions 2024(R0-10 V2) , 2030(R0-10 V2) and 3012(R0-10 V3) - Added new VDiag $39 for software 3013 V2.0 Martie 2017 : Modification by GLAVAN Dragos-Cosmin : -Added new lines for Radio Country Brazil and Australia/NZ -Added new VDiag 61($3D) -HardwareNumber.BasicPartList changed value from "HARDW" to "28115" -Added software 3014 on VDiag $39 , added software 3401 on VDiag $3D

Item.Text: test completed OK : default not present
Default not yet checked by the ECU
Default detected, confirmed but not more present
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: Alarm_code
Data.Comment: code to be stored in world wide Renault database

Data.Name: Last AS operation.year
Data.Comment: Year of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: TUNER1.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: Last AS operation.day
Data.Comment: Day of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio from an other ECU

Data.Name: Last AS operation.month
Data.Comment: Month of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: Rotary switch decrease since last clear
Rotary switch increase since last clear

Data.Name: ECU Configuration.SDVC
Data.Comment: Speed dependant volume control curve configuration

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: This service is to allow the tool to switch the ECU into a Diagnosis session.

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field Max
Data.Comment: antenna field Max [dBuV], maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field Mean
Data.Comment: antenna field Mean [dBuV], average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field Min
Data.Comment: antenna field Min [dBuV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: IOControl.Availibility
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartC0
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: IOControl.AvailibilityLID2
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Label.Text: 1/10 MHz si FM KHz si MW
Bit 3 : rear tweeters ( =1 if fitted, =0 if not)
Bit 2 : front tweeters ( =1 if fitted, =0 if not)
Bit 1 : rear loudspeakers ( =1 if fitted, =0 if not)
Bit 0 : front loudspeakers ( =1 if fitted, =0 if not)
Bit 7,6 : 00= Type 1 (6 wires, no mute); 10= Type 2 (6 wires, mute) : Default configuration; 01= (6 wires, validation thumbwheel); 11= No SWRC configured
Bit 5 : Clock display : 0 = No clock displayed (default configuration); 1 = Clock displayed
Bit 4 : external audio ECU connection (AUX IN): 0 = Not present; 1 = Present
Bit 3 : SDVC info present : 0 = Not present; 1 = Present
Bit 2,1 : AM tuner activation : 00 = AM (LW & MW) activated; 01 = LW activated, MW deactivated; 10 = LW deactivated, MW activated; 11 = AM (LW & MW) deactivated
